narrative: Surgical count for elective laparoscopic appendectomy. Baseline count completed before incision with circulating RN and scrub tech, audibly and visibly verifying each sponge, sharp, and instrument with items separated on the back table. No intra-op staff relief occurred. Closing-cavity count performed before peritoneal closure: 24/24 sponges, 12/12 sharps, 47/47 instruments — all reconciled. Skin-closure final count repeated with identical totals; documented in EHR with both RN and scrub signatures. All counts reconciled; correct final count verified. Patient transported to PACU at 11:42.
